offer: For hospitality procurement officers processing 10-20 suppliers, inconsistent inventory levels cause stockouts. We automate weekly inventory restock alerts instead of manual tracking of inventory levels.
problem: Inconsistent inventory levels leading to stockouts
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for hospitality procurement officers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management

Collect 10 short interviews from target users
